name: codex-coach
description: Local-first coaching readouts for higher-leverage Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Review local Codex updates, capability usage, and recent work recommendations.
interface.longDescription: Codex Coach runs a local CLI readout that shows what changed in Codex, maps observed workflow capabilities, and suggests structured next-time recommendations from local metadata.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Coach to show what's new.
Use Codex Coach to review my recent work.
Use Codex Coach to reset the demo state.
